channel.title: Pages on abund4nt's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on abund4nt's Blog

item.title: About
item.description:
My name is Lukas Gaete 🇨🇱, I’m 18 years old and I’m currently working as a Pentester. I am interested in cryptography and low level vulnerabilities. I actively participate in CTF competitions.

My certifications.

  • Red Team Ops (CRTO)
